title: Alphabet Releases Latest Financial Report: AI Features Drive 17% Growth in Google Search Revenue, Monthly Active Users Exceed 1 Billion
excerpt: Google's CEO Sundar Pichai announced during the company's earnings call on Wednesday that generative AI features such as AI Overview and AI Mode are strongly dr
content_html:
Google's CEO Sundar Pichai announced during the company's earnings call on Wednesday that generative AI features such as AI Overview and AI Mode are strongly driving growth in Google search queries, dispelling market concerns that AI would replace traditional search.  

Data shows that since its global launch last October, "AI Mode" has exceeded 1 billion monthly active users. It not only achieved a stepwise increase in search queries but also sent billions of clicks to external websites each week through AI features.

Empowered directly by AI tools, Google's core search business revenue grew strongly by 17% year-over-year. Combined with the recently concluded FIFA World Cup, the intensive high-frequency search demand pushed Google search volume to a historical high, further verifying user engagement with the search ecosystem enhanced by AI. Alphabet's total revenue for this quarter reached $119.8 billion, an increase of 24% year-over-year. Although the closing stock price fell slightly by 1.24% due to market sentiment, the position of search as the core profit driver of the group remains solid.

However, the data disclosed by Pichai contrasts sharply with the current survival situation of the digital publishing industry. Many media organizations and publishers point out that traditional website traffic is facing continuous decline due to AI directly generating answers without clear source links.

The rapid development of Google's AI search indicates that generative AI is accelerating the reshaping of information distribution and traffic allocation logic. How to achieve a sustainable balance between improving user search experience and maintaining the content creator ecosystem will remain a core issue in the evolution of search engines.

sentences.zh: 如何在改善用户搜索体验和维护内容创作者生态之间实现可持续的平衡，仍将是搜索引擎演进的核心问题。

content_html_zh:
谷歌首席执行官桑达尔·皮查伊 (Sundar Pichai) 在周三的公司财报电话会议上宣布，AI Overview 和 AI Mode 等生成式人工智能功能正在强劲推动谷歌搜索查询的增长，打消了市场对人工智能将取代传统搜索的担忧。

数据显示，自去年10月全球上线以来，“AI模式”月活跃用户已突破10亿。 它不仅实现了搜索查询量的逐步增加，还通过人工智能功能每周向外部网站发送数十亿次点击。

在人工智能工具的直接赋能下，谷歌核心搜索业务收入同比强劲增长17%。 结合刚刚结束的FIFA世界杯，密集的高频搜索需求将Google搜索量推向历史新高，进一步验证了用户对AI增强的搜索生态的参与度。 Alphabet本季度总营收达到1198亿美元，同比增长24%。 尽管受市场情绪影响，收盘股价小幅下跌1.24%，但搜索作为集团核心盈利驱动力的地位依然稳固。

然而，皮查伊披露的数据与当前数字出版行业的生存状况形成鲜明对比。 许多媒体机构和出版商指出，由于人工智能在没有明确来源链接的情况下直接生成答案，传统网站流量面临持续下降。

谷歌AI搜索的快速发展表明，生成式AI正在加速重塑信息分发和流量分配逻辑。 如何在改善用户搜索体验和维护内容创作者生态之间实现可持续的平衡，仍将是搜索引擎演进的核心问题。
